opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis introduces unique latency challenges; you’ll quickly find that even small delays in data aggregation and model inference significantly impact signal quality. Consider a hierarchical routing strategy – a fast, smaller model for initial filtering and trend identification, then escalating to larger, more capable models only for high-confidence signals. The cost of that escalation can easily dwarf the initial model expenses.
actions.reasoning: My experience in building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly those involving external data sources and routing across different LLMs, aligns directly with the challenges presented in this project.
